summary: A Go-based modular orchestration tool with a plugin system that detects, runs, and reports on schema-defined assertions, primarily targeting Kubernetes environments.
concerns: uncommitted changes (5 modified, 6 untracked) indicate instability
automated session metadata commits cluttering git history
recent commits are mostly merge and chore operations, lacking feature work
examples limited to kubernetes, suggesting narrow scope or early maturity
suggestions: commit or stash the current working tree changes to stabilize the branch
configure .gitignore or CI to prevent automated metadata commits from polluting history
add documentation for the plugin system to clarify extension points
expand examples beyond kubernetes to demonstrate broader capabilities
